item.title: v3.17.7 版本更新：移除 Protobus、修正 Claude 4 提示
item.itunes:title: v3.17.7 版本更新：移除 Protobus、修正 Claude 4 提示
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • [PROTOBUS] showChatView protobus removal by @canvrno in #3862
  • Fix Claude 4 family diff edit prompt by @arafatkatze in #3866
  • Changeset version bump by @github-actions in #3864

Full Changelog: v3.17.6...v3.17.7
item.description:
What's Changed

  • [PROTOBUS] showChatView protobus removal by @canvrno in #3862
  • Fix Claude 4 family diff edit prompt by @arafatkatze in #3866
  • Changeset version bump by @github-actions in #3864

Full Changelog: v3.17.6...v3.17.7
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • [PROTOBUS] showChatView protobus removal by @canvrno in #3862
  • Fix Claude 4 family diff edit prompt by @arafatkatze in #3866
  • Changeset version bump by @github-actions in #3864

Full Changelog: v3.17.6...v3.17.7

item.title: v3.17.6 更新：Protobus 遷移、新增模型支援 (Cerebras/Claude 4/Gemini 2.5 Pro)、使用者體驗改進
item.itunes:title: v3.17.6 更新：Protobus 遷移、新增模型支援 (Cerebras/Claude 4/Gemini 2.5 Pro)、使用者體驗改進
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Migrate openMcpSettings protobus by @celestial-vault in #3778
  • Adds telemetry to record the usage of keyboard and lightbulb icon shortcuts in Cline by @arafatkatze in #3695
  • Migrate openExtensionSettings protobus by @celestial-vault in #3786
  • Migrate showAccountViewClicked protobus by @celestial-vault in #3787
  • [PROTOBUS] Move openInBrowser to protobus by @canvrno in #3691
  • Use identify to enhance distinct user segmentation by @trevhud in #3765
  • [PROTOBUS] Move requestTotalTasksSize to protobus by @canvrno in #3608
  • add missing fuction by @trevhud in #3834
  • Sambanova models update list and docs link by @luisfucros in #3419
  • [PROTOBUS] Re-enable streaming state, fix the memory leak probably by @Garoth in #3754
  • Added Cerebras as a Provider by @kevint-cerebras in #3810
  • Migrate authCallback protobus by @celestial-vault in #3846
  • [PROTOBUS] remove invoke message, replace usage by @canvrno in #3609
  • Add a beautiful experience for new users of Cline by @arafatkatze in #3719
  • Support Diff Editing for Claude 4 family of Models by @arafatkatze in #3816
  • reset recommended model by @celestial-vault in #3857
  • Show Gemini 2.5 Pro prompt cache by @arafatkatze in #3859
  • Improve documentation for "For New Coders" page by @kevinneung in #3785
  • allow uploading more file types by @0xToshii in #3824
  • feat: add vscode language model api config docs by @francisgreenleaf in #3836
  • Minor fixes in the Documentation for broken links and typos. by @SeanGallen in #3820
  • Changeset version bump by @github-actions in #3783

New Contributors

  • @luisfucros made their first contribution in #3419
  • @kevint-cerebras made their first contribution in #3810
  • @francisgreenleaf made their first contribution in #3836
  • @SeanGallen made their first contribution in #3820

Full Changelog: v3.17.5...v3.17.6
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Migrate openMcpSettings protobus by @celestial-vault in #3778
  • Adds telemetry to record the usage of keyboard and lightbulb icon shortcuts in Cline by @arafatkatze in #3695
  • Migrate openExtensionSettings protobus by @celestial-vault in #3786
  • Migrate showAccountViewClicked protobus by @celestial-vault in #3787
  • [PROTOBUS] Move openInBrowser to protobus by @canvrno in #3691
  • Use identify to enhance distinct user segmentation by @trevhud in #3765
  • [PROTOBUS] Move requestTotalTasksSize to protobus by @canvrno in #3608
  • add missing fuction by @trevhud in #3834
  • Sambanova models update list and docs link by @luisfucros in #3419
  • [PROTOBUS] Re-enable streaming state, fix the memory leak probably by @Garoth in #3754
  • Added Cerebras as a Provider by @kevint-cerebras in #3810
  • Migrate authCallback protobus by @celestial-vault in #3846
  • [PROTOBUS] remove invoke message, replace usage by @canvrno in #3609
  • Add a beautiful experience for new users of Cline by @arafatkatze in #3719
  • Support Diff Editing for Claude 4 family of Models by @arafatkatze in #3816
  • reset recommended model by @celestial-vault in #3857
  • Show Gemini 2.5 Pro prompt cache by @arafatkatze in #3859
  • Improve documentation for "For New Coders" page by @kevinneung in #3785
  • allow uploading more file types by @0xToshii in #3824
  • feat: add vscode language model api config docs by @francisgreenleaf in #3836
  • Minor fixes in the Documentation for broken links and typos. by @SeanGallen in #3820
  • Changeset version bump by @github-actions in #3783

New Contributors

  • @luisfucros made their first contribution in #3419
  • @kevint-cerebras made their first contribution in #3810
  • @francisgreenleaf made their first contribution in #3836
  • @SeanGallen made their first contribution in #3820

Full Changelog: v3.17.5...v3.17.6
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Migrate openMcpSettings protobus by @celestial-vault in #3778
  • Adds telemetry to record the usage of keyboard and lightbulb icon shortcuts in Cline by @arafatkatze in #3695
  • Migrate openExtensionSettings protobus by @celestial-vault in #3786
  • Migrate showAccountViewClicked protobus by @celestial-vault in #3787
  • [PROTOBUS] Move openInBrowser to protobus by @canvrno in #3691
  • Use identify to enhance distinct user segmentation by @trevhud in #3765
  • [PROTOBUS] Move requestTotalTasksSize to protobus by @canvrno in #3608
  • add missing fuction by @trevhud in #3834
  • Sambanova models update list and docs link by @luisfucros in #3419
  • [PROTOBUS] Re-enable streaming state, fix the memory leak probably by @Garoth in #3754
  • Added Cerebras as a Provider by @kevint-cerebras in #3810
  • Migrate authCallback protobus by @celestial-vault in #3846
  • [PROTOBUS] remove invoke message, replace usage by @canvrno in #3609
  • Add a beautiful experience for new users of Cline by @arafatkatze in #3719
  • Support Diff Editing for Claude 4 family of Models by @arafatkatze in #3816
  • reset recommended model by @celestial-vault in #3857
  • Show Gemini 2.5 Pro prompt cache by @arafatkatze in #3859
  • Improve documentation for "For New Coders" page by @kevinneung in #3785
  • allow uploading more file types by @0xToshii in #3824
  • feat: add vscode language model api config docs by @francisgreenleaf in #3836
  • Minor fixes in the Documentation for broken links and typos. by @SeanGallen in #3820
  • Changeset version bump by @github-actions in #3783

New Contributors

  • @luisfucros made their first contribution in #3419
  • @kevint-cerebras made their first contribution in #3810
  • @francisgreenleaf made their first contribution in #3836
  • @SeanGallen made their first contribution in #3820

Full Changelog: v3.17.5...v3.17.6

item.title: v3.17.5 修正：加入 Diff 編輯失敗標記使用說明
item.itunes:title: v3.17.5 修正：加入 Diff 編輯失敗標記使用說明
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • fix: add instruction to use valid SEARCH/REPLACE markers when diff edit fails by @saoudrizwan in #3776

item.description:
What's Changed

  • fix: add instruction to use valid SEARCH/REPLACE markers when diff edit fails by @saoudrizwan in #3776

item.title: v3.17.3更新：修復中文README與工具Bug，新增腳本設定
item.itunes:title: v3.17.3更新：修復中文README與工具Bug，新增腳本設定
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Fix the Syntax in zh-tw/README.md to Improve Text Rendering by @limitx0 in #3724
  • Add vscode CSS properties to the script get-vscode-usages.sh by @sjf in #3752
  • fix: replace_in_file tool consistently failing with Claude 4 Sonnet due to a few specific quirks by @saoudrizwan in #3757

New Contributors

  • @limitx0 made their first contribution in #3724

Full Changelog: v3.17.2...v3.17.3
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Fix the Syntax in zh-tw/README.md to Improve Text Rendering by @limitx0 in #3724
  • Add vscode CSS properties to the script get-vscode-usages.sh by @sjf in #3752
  • fix: replace_in_file tool consistently failing with Claude 4 Sonnet due to a few specific quirks by @saoudrizwan in #3757

New Contributors

  • @limitx0 made their first contribution in #3724

Full Changelog: v3.17.2...v3.17.3
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Fix the Syntax in zh-tw/README.md to Improve Text Rendering by @limitx0 in #3724
  • Add vscode CSS properties to the script get-vscode-usages.sh by @sjf in #3752
  • fix: replace_in_file tool consistently failing with Claude 4 Sonnet due to a few specific quirks by @saoudrizwan in #3757

New Contributors

  • @limitx0 made their first contribution in #3724

Full Changelog: v3.17.2...v3.17.3

item.title: v3.17.2 更新：支援 Claude 4 模型與全域工作流程
item.itunes:title: v3.17.2 更新：支援 Claude 4 模型與全域工作流程
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Claude 4 models (Sonnet 4 and Opus 4) in AWS Bedrock and Vertex AI providers
  • Add support for global workflows, allowing workflows to be shared across workspaces with local workflows taking precedence
  • Fix settings page z-index UI issues that caused display problems
  • Fix AWS Bedrock environment variable handling to properly restore process.env after API calls (Thanks @DaveFres!)

Full Changelog: v3.17.1...v3.17.2
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Claude 4 models (Sonnet 4 and Opus 4) in AWS Bedrock and Vertex AI providers
  • Add support for global workflows, allowing workflows to be shared across workspaces with local workflows taking precedence
  • Fix settings page z-index UI issues that caused display problems
  • Fix AWS Bedrock environment variable handling to properly restore process.env after API calls (Thanks @DaveFres!)

Full Changelog: v3.17.1...v3.17.2
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Claude 4 models (Sonnet 4 and Opus 4) in AWS Bedrock and Vertex AI providers
  • Add support for global workflows, allowing workflows to be shared across workspaces with local workflows taking precedence
  • Fix settings page z-index UI issues that caused display problems
  • Fix AWS Bedrock environment variable handling to properly restore process.env after API calls (Thanks @DaveFres!)

Full Changelog: v3.17.1...v3.17.2

item.title: v3.17.1 版本更新：Claude 4 新增快取功能，Opus 4 最大 Token 增至 8192
item.itunes:title: v3.17.1 版本更新：Claude 4 新增快取功能，Opus 4 最大 Token 增至 8192
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add prompt caching for Claude 4 models on Cline and OpenRouter providers
  • Increase max tokens for Claude Opus 4 from 4096 to 8192

Full Changelog: v3.17.0...v3.17.1
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add prompt caching for Claude 4 models on Cline and OpenRouter providers
  • Increase max tokens for Claude Opus 4 from 4096 to 8192

Full Changelog: v3.17.0...v3.17.1
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Add prompt caching for Claude 4 models on Cline and OpenRouter providers
  • Increase max tokens for Claude Opus 4 from 4096 to 8192

Full Changelog: v3.17.0...v3.17.1

item.title: v3.17.0 更新：支援 Claude 4/Nebius AI，設定頁改版
item.itunes:title: v3.17.0 更新：支援 Claude 4/Nebius AI，設定頁改版
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4 in both Anthropic and Vertex providers
  • Add integration with Nebius AI Studio as a new provider (Thanks @Aktsvigun!)
  • New settings page design, now split into tabs for easier navigation (Thanks Yellow Bat @dlab-anton, and Roo Team!)
  • Add custom highlight and hotkey suggestion when the assistant prompts to switch to Act mode
  • Fix MCP Server configuration bug (Thanks @Deen17!)
  • Fix model listing for Requesty provider
  • Moved all advanced settings to settings page

New Contributors

  • @Aktsvigun made their first contribution in #2789
  • @wangyijing130 made their first contribution in #3554
  • @Deen17 made their first contribution in #3716

Full Changelog: v3.16.3...v3.17.0
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4 in both Anthropic and Vertex providers
  • Add integration with Nebius AI Studio as a new provider (Thanks @Aktsvigun!)
  • New settings page design, now split into tabs for easier navigation (Thanks Yellow Bat @dlab-anton, and Roo Team!)
  • Add custom highlight and hotkey suggestion when the assistant prompts to switch to Act mode
  • Fix MCP Server configuration bug (Thanks @Deen17!)
  • Fix model listing for Requesty provider
  • Moved all advanced settings to settings page

New Contributors

  • @Aktsvigun made their first contribution in #2789
  • @wangyijing130 made their first contribution in #3554
  • @Deen17 made their first contribution in #3716

Full Changelog: v3.16.3...v3.17.0
item.content:encoded:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4 in both Anthropic and Vertex providers
  • Add integration with Nebius AI Studio as a new provider (Thanks @Aktsvigun!)
  • New settings page design, now split into tabs for easier navigation (Thanks Yellow Bat @dlab-anton, and Roo Team!)
  • Add custom highlight and hotkey suggestion when the assistant prompts to switch to Act mode
  • Fix MCP Server configuration bug (Thanks @Deen17!)
  • Fix model listing for Requesty provider
  • Moved all advanced settings to settings page

New Contributors

  • @Aktsvigun made their first contribution in #2789
  • @wangyijing130 made their first contribution in #3554
  • @Deen17 made their first contribution in #3716

Full Changelog: v3.16.3...v3.17.0

item.title: Cline v3.16.3 發布：支援 Gemini 2.5 Flash 1M tokens 及多項優化
item.itunes:title: Cline v3.16.3 發布：支援 Gemini 2.5 Flash 1M tokens 及多項優化
item.itunes:author: github-actions[bot]
item.itunes:summary:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview 05-20 model to Vertex AI provider with massive 1M token context window (Thanks @omercelik!)
  • Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+') to quickly focus Cline from anywhere in VS Code
  • Add lightbulb actions for selected text with options to "Add to Cline", "Explain with Cline", and "Improve with Cline"
  • Automatically focus Cline window after extension updates

New Contributors

  • @alejandropta made their first contribution in #3413

Full Changelog: v3.16.2...v3.16.3
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add support for Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview 05-20 model to Vertex AI provider with massive 1M token context window (Thanks @omercelik!)
  • Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+') to quickly focus Cline from anywhere in VS Code
  • Add lightbulb actions for selected text with options to "Add to Cline", "Explain with Cline", and "Improve with Cline"
  • Automatically focus Cline window after extension updates

New Contributors

  • @alejandropta made their first contribution in #3413

Full Changelog: v3.16.2...v3.16.3

  • Add support for Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview 05-20 model to Vertex AI provider with massive 1M token context window (Thanks @omercelik!)
  • Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+') to quickly focus Cline from anywhere in VS Code
  • Add lightbulb actions for selected text with options to "Add to Cline", "Explain with Cline", and "Improve with Cline"
  • Automatically focus Cline window after extension updates

item.title: Cline v3.16.2 升級：支援 Gemini 1.5 Flash 1M tokens、強化互動操作

  • Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+') to quickly focus Cline from anywhere in VS Code
  • Add lightbulb actions for selected text with options to "Add to Cline", "Explain with Cline", and "Improve with Cline"
  • Automatically focus Cline window after extension updates

  • Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+') to quickly focus Cline from anywhere in VS Code

What's Changed

  • Add support for Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview 05-20 model to Vertex AI provider with massive 1M token context window (Thanks @omercelik!)
  • Add keyboard shortcut (Cmd+') to quickly focus Cline from anywhere in VS Code
  • Add lightbulb actions for selected text with options to "Add to Cline", "Explain with Cline", and "Improve with Cline"
